calendar.matters:
Petition For Instructions Directing Sale Of Trust Property And Petition Of Beneficiary To Suspend Powers And To Remove Co-Trustees
Off Calendar May-24-2011 Denied
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Carolyn Espey for Cathy Cheung and Ross Johnson (Co-Trustees). Robin Diamond appeared by telephone for Ted Johnson.

The Court stated that it does not see a basis for removal of the Co-Trustees, that it appears that the sale of the property is moving forward and that it is within a range of the appraisal of the property. Counsel presented oral argument to support their positions. The Court questioned the 5% commissions going to the Attorney. The Petition for Instructions Directing Sale of The Trust Property and To Suspend Powers and To Remove Co-Trustees was denied without prejudice. Ms. Espey is to prepare the order.

Judge: Mary Wiss. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy R. Cabrera.
